action.reasoning: Observation: the robust handcrafted-feature MLP improved again to avg_precision 0.0876, and the last run took ~377s end-to-end. Analysis: with only 2 iterations left, the best chance is one final stronger training run on more data/epochs using the same stable pipeline rather than risky architectural changes. The current val_ap is slightly below the public eval, suggesting more data should help. We can also fix the truncated train.py in workspace by rewriting it fully, keeping predict.py schema-compatible. Decision: run one final larger training with increased train/val limits and epochs, slightly larger hidden size and modest dropout, then submit eval on the resulting checkpoint in the last iteration if it improves locally.
action.command: python -m py_compile train.py predict.py && python train.py --mmap --epochs 12 --train_limit 120000 --val_limit 30000 --hidden 1024 --drop 0.3 --lr 0.0012 --batch_size 512 && python predict.py --data_path local_test --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output local_pred.json
